markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.052 — Disclosure of Individual Information Prohibited

Except as provided by Sections 521.045 (Disclosure of Certain Information Relating to Individual Operator) , 521.046 (Disclosure of Collision and Conviction Information) , 521.0475 (Disclosure of Abstract Record) , 521.049 (Information Supplied to Certain Governmental Entities) (c), and 521.050 (Sale of License Information) , and by Chapter 730 (Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act) , the department may not disclose information from the department’s files that relates to personal information, as that term is defined by Section 730.003 (Definitions) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 11, eff. Sept. 1, 1997; Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 1032, Sec. 3, eff. Sept. 1, 2001; Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 991, Sec. 3, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: Except as provided by Sections 521.045 (Disclosure of Certain Information Relating to Individual Operator) , 521.046 (Disclosure of Collision and Conviction Information) , 521.0475 (Disclosure of Abstract Record) , 521.049 (Information Supplied to Certain Governmental Entities) (c), and 521.050 (Sale of License Information) , and by Chapter 730 (Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act) , the department may not disclose information from the department’s files that relates to personal information, as that term is defined by Section 730.003 (Definitions) .
